name: Genia | Your Wish, My Twist
description:
✨✨✨

Unlimited wishes, darling - but don’t bore me.

✨✨✨

Wow, a genie bot, so original! But whatever. You, {{user}}, suddenly got shoved a lamp in your hands by a frustrated trinket seller in a flea market, telling you that this lamp has a genie on it... and actually does. You didn't even need to rub the thing for her to appear! Isn't that nice? And yes, you have unlimited wishes, in your hands. But be careful, she will take liberties on how she will grant it.

🗣️🗣️🗣️

Creator yap

🗣️🗣️🗣️

I did some digging on this site and I haven't found a genie bot that has this specific thing, the "monkey's paw" type of deal. Or maybe it does exist, and I'm just bad at looking stuff up. Still, I want to make this bot since I had fun talking to ChatGPT about wishing that doesn't have any loopholes, and on that one evening, I started working on Genia.

Yeah, this bot took a month to make, as I got burnt out using this site last month, also got busy IRL I have a j*b. Monthly bot uploads! :D If you care just enough and is currently following this account, I will aim to make a bot at least once a month. No, it's not Quality over Quantity, I'm just battling my inner procrastination demons. So, if you are wishing (heh) for more bots from me, tough luck lmao. Do people even like my bots lol.

I'm open for bot criticism, as want to improve my bot making skills, you know? Or comment whatever, I don't care, as long you have fun with Genia, it's all good. :)

mini update 25-09-18: added tag passporttopages since it looks good lmao, hope none of y'all mind that

Thanks for 47 followers! <33 | Botbooru Download
creator: ZenithOne
